features.description: Non-interactive runs (claude -p, SDK) no longer silently record managed-settings consent without the dialog
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed remote managed settings from a non-interactive run (`claude -p`, the SDK) being permanently recorded as consented without ever showing the security consent dialog

features.description: Bedrock, Vertex, and Claude Platform on AWS now default to Claude Opus 4.8
features.reference_changelog_line: Changed Bedrock, Vertex, and Claude Platform on AWS to default to Claude Opus 4.8

features.description: autoMode setting no longer read from repo-resident .claude/settings.local.json; use user settings.json
features.reference_changelog_line: Changed auto mode to no longer read `autoMode` from `.claude/settings.local.json` (repo-resident); use `~/.claude/settings.json` instead

features.description: ${user_config.*} in shell-form plugin hooks/monitors/MCP headersHelper commands rejected as shell-injection risk
features.reference_changelog_line: Plugin hooks/monitors/MCP headersHelper: `${user_config.*}` in shell-form commands is now rejected (shell-injection fix). Hooks: use exec form (`args` array) or `$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_OPTION_<KEY>`; monitors and headersHelper: read the value inside the script (config file or the server's `env` block).

features.description: pluginConfigs values no longer honored from project .claude/settings.json; only user, --settings, and managed
features.reference_changelog_line: Plugin option values (`pluginConfigs`) are no longer read from project-level `.claude/settings.json`; only user, `--settings`, and managed settings are honored

features.description: Auto mode enabled by default on Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry; disable via new disableAutoMode setting
features.reference_changelog_line: Auto mode is now available without `CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_AUTO_MODE` opt-in on Bedrock, Vertex AI, and Foundry; disable via `disableAutoMode` in settings
